---
title: "Shinylive Test"
format: html
filters:
  - shinylive
---

```{shinylive-r}
#| standalone: true
#| viewerHeight: 300

library(shiny)

ui <- fluidPage(
  sliderInput("n", "N", 1, 100, 50),
  textOutput("result")
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  output$result <- renderText(paste("Value:", input$n))
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```
